# UC-12.3.18 · Ansible WinRM Transport Errors Clustering

## Description

WinRM failures block patching and compliance baselines on Windows estates.

## Value

Groups recurring certificate and listener errors for fast Windows admin triage.

## Implementation

Include `ansible_winrm_*` variables in HEC payload for correlation.

## SPL

```spl
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:result" OR sourcetype="ansible:callback"
| search "winrm" OR "WSMan" OR "ssl" OR "certificate"
| stats count by host, playbook, status
| where count>=5
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (host × error class), Map (if geo fields exist).

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
